purpose: GL(n) positivity synthesis — four analogies + rank ladder → one wall

analogy_map.name: function_field_blueprint
analogy_map.open_side: Weil distribution positivity on Q (= lambda_a >= 0)

analogy_map.name: screw_function_suzuki
analogy_map.open_side: a -> infinity positivity / det_reg -> Xi (CCM Sec 7)

analogy_map.name: yakaboylu_intertwining
analogy_map.open_side: construct W unconditionally without assuming critical line

analogy_map.name: li_coefficients
analogy_map.proved_side: lambda_n >= 0 iff RH; GL(2)/GL(3) analogs closed in ladder

verdict: GL(2) and GL(3) close positivity via algebra (Gross-Zagier, Lefschetz). GL(1) lacks that interpretation — all routes terminate at lambda_a >= 0 for all a = RH.
